title: Company types & interview differences
subtitle: Anchors on the Map first → then Match with lines. Not a blind quiz.

levels.title: 5 archetypes where DE / AE work
levels.intro: Five portals around the crystal. Each has a Sigil and a Hook — memorize the look, do not read walls of text. Click = open portal.
levels.completeHint: All Sigils lit. On Match — same colors and arrows.

types.name: Product / Mobile
types.day: Marketing/billing ETL, marts for Product/UA, event data quality.
types.interview: SQL windows + Pandas; “explain the metric” case; sometimes Airflow/dbt in conversation.

types.name: Marketplace
types.day: Order facts, delivery statuses, SEO/ads spend, antifraud slices.
types.interview: JOIN traps 1:N, dedup, SCD “order status”, attention SQL.

types.name: Media / Content
types.day: Parsing/cleaning huge logs, performance dashboards, reproducible Reporting.
types.interview: Python Cleaning, SQL aggregates, sometimes “explain the report pipeline”.
types.stack: Python, SQL, Power BI/Looker, Sheets/Apps Script

types.name: Consulting / IoT
types.focusChip: Live coding + read the prompt carefully
types.day: Fast client pipelines, DQ, features for DS, docs.
types.interview: Live SQL/Python + modeling + logic; sometimes stats/A-B base; watch wording.
types.stack: Python, SQL, DWH, Tableau, sometimes stream

types.name: Fintech
types.day: Idempotency, payment dedup, Reconciliation, audit trails.
types.interview: SQL precision, edge cases, sometimes soft on ownership/compliance.
types.stack: SQL, Python, DWH, monitoring, strict DQ

levels.title: What does screening focus on?
levels.instruction: Do not guess: lock pairs first (like on the Map), then connect — lines appear.
levels.studyIntro: Step 1 · Sigils. Same colors and hooks as on the atlas. Say each row aloud — then Match with lines.
levels.studyCta: Locked in · start Match with lines
levels.matchTip: Left = company type → right = focus. Correct pair gets color and a line. A miss does not clear the left pick.

pairs.right: Live coding + read the prompt carefully

levels.title: Where to aim right now?
levels.scene: You are close to Analytics Engineering: SQL+Python, marts, product. Which simulation track is the main one for the next month?

choices.label: Product/Mobile + Consulting-style live SQL as second muscle
choices.feedback: Best fit for your background (media/marketing → DE). Do not scatter into fintech-K8s on day one.

choices.label: Fintech SRE / Kubernetes only from day one
choices.feedback: Different track. Fine later; now it is noise before AE screenings.

choices.label: Theory only, no tables
choices.feedback: Boring and does not prepare for Live. Prefer CSV labs in work-sim.

levels.title: What Gym covers / does not cover
levels.story: Gym = thinking rehearsal + common patterns. Not a job offer guarantee and not leaked employer tests.

flow.title: Covers
flow.desc: SQL windows, Pandas, layers, DQ, day-1, CSV drills

flow.title: Does not cover
flow.desc: Secret employer tests, 1:1 stress without your out-loud rehearsal

flow.title: Ethics
flow.desc: Only generalized/public patterns, no client brand names

bullets: Do not publish or sign exercises with company names you apply to
If a specific employer was mentioned somewhere — removed
Power = explain logic, not “guess their HackerRank id”
